overview: Amp Player 1 is a full-featured car audio system web app built by Gerrod — Engineer, Producer, Designer. It features dual amplifiers, real audio playback from device files, 30 module panels, processor characteristics, and a full signal chain powered by the Thunder Battery system.
features: Real audio file playback with device file picker
Dual audio contexts powering Bass Amp and Highs/Mids Amp
30 interactive module panels including Chip Commander, Processor Characteristics, Crossover, Smart Range Limiter
Thunder Battery 2500W system with 5W external display
Processor Characteristics converting power to punch, depth, weight, clarity, bass drop, and bass note switching
Story Button with end-credits scrolling and speech synthesis telling the story of everything Gerrod designed
Volume range 1-700 with Smart Range Limiter (20 smart chips, 30 filters)
All 16 gains locked at 0.0 — enforced in code, no exceptions
Browser to Fuse to Milliwatts handshake sequence
4 gauge wiring throughout, dark navy theme, responsive mobile layout
